TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Iratay = Gaga mniq Taytung Ranyusyang ka alang Iratay. 260 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 751 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 84% niqan 632 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 16% niqan 119 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Yami 81%, Amis2%, Paiwan1%.
S.PHON: = iɾataj = gaga mniq tajtuŋ ɾanjusjaŋ ka alaŋ iɾataj. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, jami **%, amis*%, paiwan*%.
S.FORM: = Iratay = Gaga mniq Taytung Ranyusyang ka alang Iratay. 260 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 751 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 84% niqan 632 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 16% niqan 119 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Yami 81%, Amis2%, Paiwan1%.
S.PHON: = iɾataj = gaga mniq tajtuŋ ɾanjusjaŋ ka alaŋ iɾataj. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, jami **%, amis*%, paiwan*%.
